name: I'm in Medium Maegen's Mad Room
description: I'm in Medium Maegen's Mad Room
hints: Medium Maegen's room has a crystal ball. The medium can give you crucial advice.
YELL MEDIUM to summon her for advice. Be careful with the crystal ball - breaking it is bad.
YELL MEDIUM - she tells you to keep a good luck charm and mentions a moving bag through a tight squeeze.
YELL MEDIUM for advice: need luck charm (clover/rabbit foot) and Ju-Ju bag for the tight squeeze. Do NOT BREAK the crystal ball.

effects: Message: I see nothing very special.
Message: Spirit vibrations drive me from room.
Message: A beam of light shines on grave
Message: This grAve reserved for you!

Message: Medium appears, says: `Keep a good luck charm on you & your
friend. I also see a -moving- bag helping you through a tight
squeeze!`

notes: Medium Maegen's room with the crystal ball. YELL MEDIUM for crucial advice about needing a luck charm and the Ju-Ju bag. LOOKING at the ball ejects you. BREAKING it is fatal. WEST leads to room 8.
